name: problem_solving
success_criteria: The problem is resolved, the chosen approach has been validated, and the rationale is documented.

tasks.title: Clarify the problem
tasks.description: Restate the problem in concrete terms, identify stakeholders, and confirm scope.

tasks.title: Root cause analysis
tasks.description: Identify underlying causes rather than surface symptoms. Use evidence from available sources.

tasks.title: Generate solution options
tasks.description: Brainstorm at least three distinct approaches. Document trade-offs for each.

tasks.title: Assess constraints
tasks.description: Identify time, resource, and stakeholder constraints that narrow the solution space.

tasks.title: Select approach
tasks.description: Choose the best option given the constraints. Document the decision rationale.

tasks.title: Implement
tasks.description: Execute the chosen approach. Track progress against the plan.

tasks.title: Validate outcome
tasks.description: Confirm the problem is resolved. Measure against the original success criteria.
